items.prompt: This offline module’s goal is to…
choices: build and run a real course UVM example with a simulator Makefile
replace Accellera UVM with browser sketches only
items.explain: Track A: clone/open legacy tree → make → run.

items.prompt: Before `make` in the legacy UVM tests, you typically must…
choices: set UVM_HOME to an Accellera UVM library (or use the course tools tree)
run only from the browser tools index
items.explain: Makefiles error if UVM_HOME is unset.

items.prompt: A common first offline target in the legacy tree is…
choices: only the platform tools index HTML
a synthesis netlist with no testbench
items.explain: Small UVM + Verilator example under module1/tests/uvm_tests.

items.prompt: Browser lab success does not replace compiling and running Accellera UVM offline.
items.explain: Sketches are literacy; offline proves the toolchain.
